interventions.name: P5 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: collection-meaning routines that label what each position, key, or field stands for before any operation begins

interventions.name: P5 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: stepwise iteration traces that record how the collection changes after each pass or update

interventions.name: P5 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: structure-choice comparisons requiring a reason for selecting one bounded collection form over another

interventions.name: P5 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired data-operation tasks that preserve the same pattern across a second dataset or collection type
